overview.description: The Advent Convertible Bond ETF (ACVT) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in broad credit fixed income. The fund is an actively managed fund comprised of US-issued and USD-denominated foreign-issued convertible securities. The fund seeks to deliver total return through income and capital appreciation. ACVT was launched on Apr 30, 2025 and is issued by Advent.
